description:
Advances: specled.index_state, specled.verification

Thread tag scan data through Index.build/2. Emit new verifier findings:
- requirement_without_test_tag (severity from config enforcement)
- verification_cover_untagged (warning)
- tag_scan_parse_error (warning)
- tag_dynamic_value_skipped (warning)

Conditional scanning — index keys test_tags, test_tags_errors, test_tags_config only populated when enabled. All tag findings suppressed when index has no tag data.

Touches:
- lib/specled_ex/index.ex
- lib/specled_ex/verifier.ex
- test/specled_ex/verifier_test.exs
- test/specled_ex/index_state_test.exs

Merge gate:
- [ ] Code compiles cleanly
- [ ] All new finding types emit correctly
- [ ] Enforcement config drives severity
- [ ] Existing verifier/index tests still pass
- [ ] mix spec.check passes for specled.index_state and specled.verification
title: S3: Verifier + Index tag integration
